name: closed-loop test fails with a clear error when the promotion path is broken at any step
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus active-rules && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/closed-loop-test.sh" --rules-out active-rules --simulate-failure promote 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'failed_step=promote' err.txt && grep -q 'pipeline_broken' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
